title: Cat Ear Armor
description: Small Resource pack that adds cat ears to your helmets!
body:
# What changed?
It's a small Resource Pack That adds cute cat ears to vanilla minecraft helmets! Including **turtle shell** and the **new copper helmet**
#  This Resource pack requires [ETF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) and [EMF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) to work correctly!
![EMF](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c45ba510a378c70089c50366103b729cc44f3b00.png) ![EFT](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/13cc3c983b2a0fbbcc6d53eb503a1fdcae208741.png)

This resource pack only changes the model on players and armor stands

![Helmets](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2a12ca4acb21b1a73d73540ba9c15341281d53f7.png)
